# Motion Control

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/motionControl`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/motionControl/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-DQ0csnG9.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `create-motion-control`
- `query-motion-control-single`
- `query-motion-control-list`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/videos/motion-control`
- `/v1/videos/motion-control/{id}`

## Raw API Chunk Source

```javascript
const e={title:{en:"Motion Control",zh:"动作控制"},endpoints:[{id:"create-motion-control",method:"POST",path:"/v1/videos/motion-control",title:{en:"Create Task",zh:"创建任务"},headers:[{name:"Content-Type",type:"string",required:!0,default:"application/json",description:{en:"Data Exchange Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authentication",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"prompt",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Text prompt, can include positive and negative descriptions",zh:"文本提示词，可包含正向描述和负向描述"},notes:[{en:'- Can add elements to the scene, achieve camera movement effects, etc. See [Kling "Motion Control" User Guide](https://app.klingai.com/global/quickstart/motion-control-user-guide)',zh:"- 可通过提示词为画面增加元素、实现运镜效果等，详见[可灵「动作控制」使用指南](https://docs.qingque.cn/d/home/eZQAl5y8xNSkr0iYUS8-bpGvP?identityId=2Cn18n4EIHT#section=h.xtmfpd68o18)"},{en:"- Cannot exceed 2500 characters",zh:"- 不能超过 2500 个字符"}]},{name:"image_url",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Reference image. Characters, background and other elements in generated video will follow this reference.",zh:"参考图像，生成视频中的人物、背景等元素均以参考图为准"},notes:[{en:"- Video content requirements:\n  - Character proportions should match the reference motion as much as possible; avoid driving half-body characters with full-body motions\n  - Character should show clear upper body or full body including limbs and head, avoid occlusion\n  - Avoid extreme orientations (upside down, lying flat, etc.). Character should occupy sufficient screen area\n  - Supports realistic/stylized characters (including humans/humanoid animals/some pure animals/some humanoid body proportion characters)",zh:"- 视频内容需满足以下要求：\n  - 人物比例尽量与参考动作比例一致，尽量避免全身动作驱动半身人物进行生成\n  - 人物需要露出清晰的上半身或全身的肢体及头部，避免遮挡\n  - 画面中人物避免存在极端朝向，比如倒立、平卧等。人物占画面比例不得太低\n  - 支持真实/风格化的角色（包括人物/类人动物/部分纯动物/部分类人肢体比例的角色）通过"},{en:"- Supports image Base64 encoding or image URL (ensure accessibility)",zh:"- 支持传入图片 Base64 编码或图片 URL（确保可访问）"},{en:"- Important: When using Base64, do NOT add any prefix like `data:image/png;base64,`. Submit only the raw Base64 string.",zh:"- 注意：若您使用 Base64 方式，请不要在 Base64 编码字符串前添加任何前缀（如 `data:image/png;base64,`），直接传递 Base64 编码后的字符串即可。"},{en:"- Correct Base64 format:\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"- 正确的 Base64 编码参数：\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Incorrect Base64 format (with data: prefix):\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"- 错误的 Base64 编码参数（包含 data: 前缀）：\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Supported image formats: .jpg / .jpeg / .png",zh:"- 图片格式支持 .jpg / .jpeg / .png"},{en:"- File size: ≤10MB, dimensions: 300px ~ 65536px, aspect ratio: 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1",zh:"- 图片文件大小不能超过 10MB，图片宽高尺寸介于 300px～65536px，图片宽高比介于 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1 之间"}]},{name:"video_url",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"URL of reference video. Character actions in generated video will follow this reference.",zh:"参考视频的获取链接。生成视频中的人物动作与参考视频一致。"},notes:[{en:"- Video content requirements:\n  - Character should show clear upper body or full body including all limbs and head, avoid occlusion\n  - Recommend uploading single-person action video; for 2+ people, actions will be taken from the character with largest screen proportion\n  - Recommend using real person actions; some stylized characters/humanoid body proportions may work\n  - Video should be single continuous shot with character always visible, avoid cuts or camera movements (will be truncated otherwise)\n  - Avoid overly fast actions; relatively stable actions produce better results",zh:"- 视频内容需满足以下要求：\n  - 人物需要露出清晰的上半身或全身的全部肢体及头部，避免遮挡\n  - 建议上传 1 人动作视频，2 人及以上会取画面占比最大的人物动作进行生成\n  - 推荐使用真人动作，部分风格化的人物/类人肢体比例可以通过\n  - 动作视频一镜到底，角色始终出现在画面中，避免切镜、运镜等。否则会被截取\n  - 动作避免过快，相对平稳的动作生成效果更佳"},{en:"- Supported formats: .mp4 / .mov, file size: ≤100MB, dimensions: 340px ~ 3850px. Validation failures will return error codes.",zh:"- 视频文件支持 .mp4/.mov，文件大小不超过 100MB，仅支持长宽的边长均位于 340px~3850px 之间，上述校验不通过会返回错误码等信息"},{en:'- Duration limits: minimum 3 seconds, maximum depends on character_orientation:\n  - When character_orientation is "video": maximum 30 seconds\n  - When character_orientation is "image": maximum 10 seconds',zh:"- 视频时长下限不短于 3 秒，时长上限与人物朝向参考（character_orientation）有关：\n  - 当人物朝向与视频中人物一致时，视频时长最长可达 30 秒\n  - 当人物朝向与图片中人物一致时，视频时长最长可达 10 秒"},{en:"- For complex or fast motions, results may be shorter than uploaded video duration as the model can only extract valid motion segments (minimum 3s usable continuous motion required). Credits consumed for such cases are non-refundable; consider adjusting motion difficulty and speed.",zh:"- 如果您的动作难度比较高、速度比较快，有一定概率生成不足上传视频时长的结果，因为模型只能提取有效动作时长进行生成，最短提取出 3s 可用连续动作即可生成。请注意，因此消耗的积分将无法退还，建议适当调整动作难度与速度"},{en:"- System will validate video content and return error codes if issues are found",zh:"- 系统会校验视频内容，如有问题会返回错误码等信息"}]},{name:"keep_original_sound",type:"string",required:!1,default:"yes",description:{en:"Whether to keep the original sound of the video",zh:"可选择是否保留视频原声"},enum:["yes","no"]},{name:"character_orientation",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Character orientation in generated video, can match image or video",zh:"生成视频中人物的朝向，可选择与图片一致或与视频一致"},enum:["image","video"],notes:[{en:"- image: Match character orientation in the image; reference video duration must not exceed 10 seconds",zh:"- image：与图片中人物朝向一致；此时参考视频时长不得超过 10 秒"},{en:"- video: Match character orientation in the video; reference video duration must not exceed 30 seconds",zh:"- video：与视频中人物朝向一致；此时参考视频时长不得超过 30 秒"}]},{name:"mode",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Video generation mode",zh:"生成视频的模式"},enum:["std","pro"],notes:[{en:"- std: Standard Mode - basic mode, cost-effective",zh:"- std：标准模式（标准），基础模式，性价比高"},{en:"- pro: Professional Mode (High Quality) - high performance mode, better video quality",zh:"- pro：专家模式（高品质），高表现模式，生成视频质量更佳"},{en:"- Support varies by model version and video mode. See [Capability Map](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap) for details.",zh:"- 不同模型版本、视频模式支持范围不同，详见[能力地图](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap)"}]},{name:"watermark_info",type:"object",required:!1,description:{en:"Whether to generate watermarked results simultaneously",zh:"是否同时生成含水印的结果"},notes:[{en:'- Defined by the enabled parameter, format: \n```json\n  "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```',zh:'- 通过enabled参数定义，具体格式如下：\n```json\n "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```'},{en:"- true: generate watermarked result, false: do not generate",zh:"- true 为生成，false 为不生成"},{en:"- Custom watermarks are not currently supported",zh:"- 暂不支持自定义水印"}]},{name:"callback_url",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Callback notification URL for task result. If configured, server will notify when task status changes.",zh:"本次任务结果回调通知地址，如果配置，服务端会在任务状态发生变更时主动通知"},notes:[{en:"- For specific message schema, see [Callback Protocol](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/callbackProtocol)",zh:"- 具体通知的消息 schema 见 [Callback 协议](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/callbackProtocol)"}]},{name:"external_task_id",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Customized Task ID",zh:"自定义任务 ID"},notes:[{en:"- Will not overwrite system-generated task ID, but supports querying task by this ID",zh:"- 用户自定义任务 ID，传入不会覆盖系统生成的任务 ID，但支持通过该 ID 进行任务查询"},{en:"- Must be unique within a single user account",zh:"- 请注意，单用户下需要保证唯一性"}]}],responseExample:{zh:'{\n  "code": 0, // 错误码；具体定义见错误码\n  "message": "string", // 错误信息\n  "request_id": "string", // 请求ID，系统生成，用于跟踪请求、排查问题\n  "data": {\n    "task_id": "string", // 任务ID，系统生成\n    "task_info": { //任务创建时的参数信息\n      "external_task_id": "string" //客户自定义任务ID\n    },\n    "task_status": "string", // 任务状态，枚举值：submitted（已提交）、processing（处理中）、succeed（成功）、failed（失败）\n globally unique\n          "url": "string", // URL for generating videos, anti-leech format (To ensure information security, generated images/videos will be cleared after 30 days. (seconds)\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    "watermark_info": {\n      "enabled": boolean\n   \t},\n    "final_unit_deduction": "string", // The deduction units of task\n    "created_at": "string", // 任务状态，枚举值：submitted（已提交）、processing（处理中）、succeed（成功）、failed（失败）\n      "task_status_msg": "string", // 任务状态信息，当任务失败时展示失败原因（如触发平台的内容风控等）\n      "final_unit_deduction": "string", // "string", // Task status, Enum values: submitted, processing, succeed, failed\n      "task_status_msg": "string", // Task status information, displaying the failure reason when the task fails (such as triggering the content risk control of the platform, etc.)\n      "final_unit_deduction": "string", // The deduction units of task\n      "watermark_info": {\n        "enabled": boolean\n      },\n ```
```
